top_signals.title: Akamai Seeks to Raise $2.6 Billion in Convertible Bond Offering
top_signals.summary: Akamai Technologies Inc. is seeking to raise $2.6 billion in a convertible bond offering to fund spending on cloud computing infrastructure.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
